scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3F-ast.s3e > /tmp/_s3f_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s3f_ast.ts Stage3F-ast.ts && npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3F-lower.s3e > /tmp/_s3f_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s3f_lower.ts Stage3F-lower.ts && npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3F-codegen.s3e > /tmp/_s3f_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s3f_codegen.ts Stage3F-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../3E/index.ts Stage3F.s3e > /tmp/_s3f_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s3f_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
